start.text: In a land of myth and a time of magic, you are a brave adventurer embarking on a quest to restore peace to the kingdom.

dark_forest.text: You venture into the Dark Forest. The trees loom overhead, and shadows dance between the trunks.

choices.text: Follow the winding path deeper into the forest

ancient_library.text: At the Ancient Library, dusty tomes and scrolls line the shelves. A wise sage approaches you.

choices.text: Search the library for ancient spells

mysterious_creature.text: A mysterious creature emerges from the shadows. It's a Goblin, looking to test your strength.

battle.message: A wild Goblin challenges you to a duel!

deep_forest_battle.text: As you follow the path, an Orc ambushes you, seeking to claim your quest as their own.

battle.message: A fierce Orc blocks your way, ready to fight!

sage_guidance.text: The sage shares ancient knowledge, enhancing your abilities.

choices.text: Thank the sage and continue your journey
Stay longer to learn more secrets

hidden_spell.text: You discover a hidden spell in the library, granting you the power to summon a protective shield.

battle.message: A relentless Skeleton raises its sword to attack!

enhanced_journey.text: With newfound strength, you feel more prepared for the challenges ahead.

battle.message: A mighty Dragon descends from the skies, determined to stop you!

goblin_defeated.text: Having defeated the Goblin, you gain valuable experience.

choices.text: Press 'G' or click 'Next' to continue your journey.

orc_defeated.text: You have vanquished the Orc, proving your valor.

choices.text: Press 'G' or click 'Next' to continue your journey.

sage_guidance_defeated.text: You successfully harnessed the sage's teachings and defeated the Skeleton.

choices.text: Press 'G' or click 'Next' to continue your journey.

hidden_spell_defeated.text: Using your hidden spell, you defeated the Skeleton with ease.

choices.text: Press 'G' or click 'Next' to continue your journey.

enhanced_journey_defeated.text: With your enhanced abilities, you slay the Dragon, restoring peace to the kingdom!

end.text: Thank you for playing Epic Quest RPG - Task Manager!
